name: Spinach Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the bottom of a lasagne pan with 1/3 of the sauce.
2. Arrange a layer of uncooked noodles (5-6 pieces) on the bottom.
3. Cover with the second 1/3 of the sauce.
4. Combine ricotta, parmesan, and spinach and spoon half of the mixture over the noodles.
5. Place a second layer of noodles over the cheese mixture, then the remaining cheese mixture.
6. Cover with the remaining sauce.
7. Top with mozzarella and jack cheese.
8. Cover with foil, domed so that the cheese doesn't stick to the top.
9. Bake for 45 minutes at 375 degrees.
10. Remove foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
11. Allow to set for half an hour before cutting to serve.
